name: rate-type CTE year pushdown regression (reported short URL shape)
description: Locks in the year pushdown and MATERIALIZED contract for rate-type CTEs. Mirrors the reported short URL b2444f674a4ea609679e002dfdcc6fa1: year splits 2020-2025, espn scores with career_year filter, and a rate-type column whose effective_years come solely from data_view_options.year_range (no column-level params.year or nfl_week_id on player_nfl_teams).
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2020,2021,2022,2023,2024,2025]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.primary_position IN ('WR', 'TE')), "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs.nfl_team) as teams, "nfl_games"."season_year" as "year" from "player_gamelogs" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."season_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."season_year" in (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025) and "player_gamelogs"."season_year" in (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025) group by "nfl_games"."season_year", "player_gamelogs"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."primary_position" AS "primary_position_0", "player"."nfl_draft_year" AS "nfl_draft_year_0", t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.teams as player_nfl_teams_0, "player_seasonlogs"."espn_open_score" AS "espn_open_score_0", "player_seasonlogs"."espn_catch_score" AS "espn_catch_score_0", "player_seasonlogs"."espn_yac_score" AS "espn_yac_score_0", "player_years"."year", "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb" on "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "player_seasonlogs" on "player_seasonlogs"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_seasonlogs"."year" = "player_years"."year" and "player_seasonlogs"."seas_type" = 'REG' and "player_seasonlogs"."career_year" between 1 and 2 where player.primary_position IN ('WR', 'TE') AND player.nfl_draft_year >= '2021' group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."primary_position", "player"."nfl_draft_year", t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.teams, "player_seasonlogs"."espn_open_score", "player_seasonlogs"."espn_catch_score", "player_seasonlogs"."espn_yac_score", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 7 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
